titleStmt.title: SII 28.154: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 154. (A.R. No. 309 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, Second prākāra, north wall.

Records the royal order approving the grant of land to God Vikkiramachōḷīśvaram-uḍaiyār set up by himself in the palavaravai land in Parakēsari-nallūr, a hamlet (piḍāgai) of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr a taṉiyūr in Rājādhirāja-vaḷanāḍu and to provide the house-sites (kuḍiy-iruppu-nattam) for the brāhmins settled around that temple, by Araiyaṉ Edirilichōḻaṉ alias Iruṅgōḷaṉ, the uḍaiyāṉ of Chēndamaṅgalam, in Neṉmali-nāḍu in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The royal order also approved the donor's granting equal extent of land elsewhere in exchange (pratiankshētram) to the God of the place for having granted away land included in that God's palavaravai, and arranging that land to be taken into the paḻavaravai and that exemption of that land from paying the kāśu demand due to the ūr (ūriṟ-kaḷikkavam)

As per the request of Iruṅgōḷan the king also ordered that the concerned deeds might be taken into the temple (-registry) and the record might be inscribed at the outer entrance of Vikkirama-chōḻan-tirumāḷigai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅgacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu paṉniraṇṭāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟirupattañciṉāl vanta tirumukappaṭi rājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmali nāṭṭuc centamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ
Etirili coḻaṉāna Iruṅkoḷaṉ rājādhirājavaḷanāṭṭut taṉiyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūrp piṭākai parakecarinallūṟ palavaravaiyāṉa nilattu Eḻuntaruḷivitta vikrama coḷiśvaramuṭaiyār śrīkoyilun tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa vaiyiṟṟukkum Ikkoyil cūḻavaitta brāhma
ṇarkkuk kuṭiyiruppu nattamākavum Ivvūrk kuṭikkāṇiyāṉa nilattukkuk kiḻakkum tiruviticcampantaṉ kalluvitta kuḷattukku nirpāyum tūmpukku rkkut teṟku civapātacekaraṉ cittat tuṇaipperumāḷ tirupputiyutūṭṭu viḷākattukku Eḻuntaruḷun tiruvitikkum
tiruviticcampantaṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta devar koyilil melait tirumaṭaiviḷākattu maṉaiyum vāniḷamum Eḻukol nikki Itaṉ meṟkum meṟkiṭṭu ṟa vāykkālukkun tiruviticcampantaṉ Eḻuntaruḷivitta devar koyilil vaṭakkiṟ tirumaṭaiviḷākattukkum veṇāṭu
ṭaiyāṉ Eṭuppitta maṭattil vāniḷamuk kolukku vaṭakkum naṭuvupaṭṭa nilamāyppalavaravaikkuṭalāy varukiṟa nilattile perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Ūr ṉṟe Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇi nilam palavaravaik kuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭi tavintu peṟavum Iṉnilattukku pratikṣetramāka Ivvūrp pi
ṭākai paḷḷipaṭaiyāna vikkiramacoḻanallūril Iruṅkoḷaṉ Aṉṉiya ṉāmakaraṇattāl paṉniraṇṭāvatu kumpaṉāyaṟṟut tiyati Eṭṭiṉāl rājādhirāja vaḷaṉāṭṭut taniyūr perumpaṟṟappuliyūr Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Iravi poṉnampalakkūttaṉ pakkal Ivvūr vācciyaṉ māte tiraṉ peril
vilaikoṇṭa cuntaracoḻavatikku kiḻakku rājārāja vāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu pāmpāṭṭiyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukkellai mayilaikkavuciyaṉ poṉnampalakkūttan pāṇi nilattukkuk kiḻakkum vācciyaṉ nakkaṉ ti
rucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattiṉukku teṟkum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ vaṭukaṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ nilattiṉukku meṟkuṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum Uṭpaṭṭa nilam kālum meṟpaṭivati vāykkālā
ka Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattuc ceṭṭi ceyyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉukkellai kauciyaṉ civaṉ tevaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkuk kiḻakkuṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu vāykkālukkut teṟkum Aṟutikku meṟkum vācciya nakaraṉ Etirilāpperumāḷ nilattukku vaṭakkumāka Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellaiyumuṭpaṭa nilam Āṟumāvum Irukaṭappāṭṭālum vanta nilam Araiye Orumāvum Ivvūr vācciyaṉ nakaraṉ Etirilāp perumāḷum Ivaṉaiye mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya Ivaṉ mātāvācciyaṉ mātevaṉ nakaraṉ brāhmaṇi pūtai pakkal kāmakkāṇi tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyā
ṉ nittakalliyāṇaṉ peril vilaikoṇṭa vikkirama coḻanallūrppāl cuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakku rājarāja vāykkālukkut teṟku Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ catirattu ceṭṭiceyyeṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa nilattiṉuk kellai cuntaracoḻavatikkuk kiḻakkum mituṇikkuṭik kavuciyaṉ
koṟṟaṉ civaṉ brāhmaṇi Uḷḷiṭṭār nilattukkum Uḻaiccāṇaṉ Iravipoṉṉampalakkūttaṉ nilattukkukkut teṟkum Aṟutikku meṟkum maṭappuṟattukku vaṭakkum Āka Ivvicainta ṉāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam Araiye Orumā mukkāṇiyum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭu
māmukkāṇiyum paṉniraṇṭāvatu pacāṉam mutal palavaravaiyoṭuṅ kūṭṭavum Iṉnilattukku Ivvūr taṇṭa niccayitta kācil Innilattukku maṭakkopātiyāl vanta kācu Ūriṟ kaḻikkavum Ikkoyiṟ teṟkiṟ tirumaṭaiviḷākattu Ikkoyil nivantakāraṟkkuk kuṭiyiruppu nattamākavum tapasya
rkkum Uḻumākat teṉkai vaṭakai kol patiṉeḻaraiyuṅ kiḻkkai kol E ti Araikkālum Ippaṭi Āḷuṭaiyār koyilil vikkiramacoḻan tirumāḷikaippuṟa vāyilil kalveṭṭaveṇuveṉṟum Ipramāṇaṅkaḷ koyilil Oṭukkuk koḷḷappeṟa veṇume
ṉṟum Iruṅkoḷaṉ coṉnamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavatākac collik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷak kaṭavatāka varikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkuc coṉṉom Ittevarkku śrīkoyilum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum brāhmaṇaṟkuk kuṭiyiruppu nattamākavum peṟṟa nilam Iruṅkoḷaṉ nicca
yittapaṭiye kaiykkoḷkaveṉṟu tirumantira Olai neṟiyuṭaiccoḻamuventaveḷāṉ Eḻuti kurukularāyarum viḻiñattarayarum naraciṅkapaṉmarum pāṇṭiyarāyarum malaiyapparāyarum veṇāṭuṭaiyārum maḻavarāyarum kāṭuveṭṭikaḷum vayirātarāyarum Eḻuttiṭṭa tirumukappaṭi kalveṭṭittu tirucciṟṟampalam §
Digital edition of SII 28.154 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
